# Misc notes for Winradio

## Linux

Dear god.  

* https://linradio.sourceforge.net/  

* Compile from source time

* I don't know why but i had to make the .config very specific
  
  ```bash
  # Generated by ./configure
  
  TCLINCLUDE=-I/usr/include/tcl  
  TCLPATH=-L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  
  TCLLIB=-ltcl  
  TKINCLUDE=-I/usr/include/tk  
  TKPATH=-L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  
  TKLIB=-ltk
  ```
  
  * At one point it couldn't find asm/io.h so i pointed it at sys/io.h instead
  * Commands need to set LD_LIBRARY_PATH unless you install the library
    `LD_LIBRARY_PATH='/home/user/Downloads/linradio-toolkit-0.7/driver' ./tclradio`

* wrcontrol didn't want to link due to missing exp and log functions, manually added -lm for the math lib and ran 

`gcc -o wrcontrol wrcontrol.o liblinradio.so -lm`

* `make -C driver test` will call wrcontrol and make the radio make noise briefly and spit out the command results

* As written, device selection is horrible and sticks the device number over the x in the constant '/dev/ttySx'. I changed this constant to '/dev/ttyUSBx' in wrserial.c so it would find my adapter
